task.goal: Rebrand display name '7Greens' -> '7G Greens' across all UI / copy / metadata
Verify build passes with zero errors (build, lint, typecheck)
Photo optimization for 27 product catalog - audit sizes, compress, verify formats
SEO audit - meta tags, Open Graph, structured data (JSON-LD)
Accessibility audit - WCAG 2.1 AA compliance, axe-core, keyboard nav
Scaffold Payload CMS Product collection + seed Starter/Family/add-on SKUs
Box-size selector + add-on grid at app/(store)/boxes/page.tsx
Checkout page: delivery/pickup toggle, subscription vs one-time, customer form
Mobile-first checkout audit at 360/768/1280px
Order submission API + confirmation page + confirmation email
Payload CMS DeliveryZone collection + admin panel + seed initial ZIP ranges
ZIP-code checker on homepage (app/api/zip-check/route.ts + ZipChecker component)
Pickup scheduling UI — slot selector in checkout
Automated notifications: confirmation email + day-before reminder email + SMS (Twilio) via Vercel Cron
Payload CMS Partner collection + admin panel; seed 2S Ranch + Southern Sunny Acres
Embeddable partner widget (Shopify Buy Button / Storefront API)
Centralized inventory + order management dashboard across channels
2S Ranch + Southern Sunny Acres pilot integration smoke test
Payload CMS Event collection + event calendar + event detail pages
Blog/news posts + photo galleries via Payload CMS
Newsletter signup form + API route + Resend/SendGrid list integration
Payload CMS admin audit + role-based access: operator admin vs partner read-only
